CustomField.description: Total Contract Value. Formula = ACV__c * Subscription_Term_Years__c. Treats blanks as blanks so a null Subscription_Term_Years__c (unmapped picklist value) propagates to a null TCV rather than silently zeroing — preserves the "null as data-quality signal" pattern set up on Subscription_Term_Years__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated as ACV × subscription term years.
CustomField.label: TCV
